Embalmers Skinning Knife  
 

Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 25
DMG: 4 Dmg Bonus: 35
Backstab DMG: 4
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
Effect: Summon Bandages (Combat, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 2.0 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL except CLR PAL DRU MNK SHM BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Embalmers Skinning Knife
Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 25
DMG: 4 Dmg Bonus: 35
Backstab DMG: 4
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
Effect: Summon Bandages (Combat, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 2.0 Size: SMALL

Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Lore:Skinning Knife
Item Type:1H Piercing
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:1 pp 0 gp 1 sp 5 cp
Tribute:240

Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-18 19:23:31
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Average Price: No Data Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 43

▲ Page top
This is going to annoy people but...
QuoteReply
# Jun 01 2005 at 6:16 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591787816227
118 posts
Why no apostrophe?
My friend told me to search for the embalmber's skinning knife on here, so I did a search, and it kept coming up with nothing... until finally I asked in the bazaar and they told me what happened... Embalmbers! ARGH!

Additionally, they should let Berserkers use this... sure it's not a 2 hander, but every melee class but berserkers can use it.. for the effect obviously.

Edited, Wed Jun 1 19:18:19 2005
▲ Page top
Multi Proc
QuoteReply
# Jan 09 2005 at 6:17 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592263216610
104 posts
Just for those wondering, If you already have a pile of bandages on your cursor, this will still proc and subsequet piles will be there untill tou empty the piles to your invantory. So if it procs 3 times in a battle there will be 3 piles to be put into invantory. Yes I personally verified this

Pile = whatever amount you get per proc. It seems the amount you get is level bassed. Formula is Level/2 rounded up. So a level 11 (11/2 = 5.5 rounded up = 6) and a level 12 (12/2 = 6) will get 6 bandages per proc. Level 39+ will proc a Stack (20 bandages). Yes my observations verify this

Knife has to be weilded, so check pic above to see if your class is there, if it is not then this knife will be usless for you to use. Yes i have tried clicking, nothing, only worked in battle with something, greens as good as reds - greens just dont last as long. :)

I do not use this as my primary, just have it for the bandages

The commens below basicly say the same as here - no need read any further. :) Happy hunting.

Nolene, 41 Woodelf Rogue, Zeb Server.

Edited, Sun Jan 9 06:20:16 2005
▲ Page top
RE: Multi Proc
QuoteReply
# Apr 01 2006 at 9:35 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591863751171
877 posts
Primary or secondary hand isn't a big deal. If you want lower DPS for a while, secondary. If you want even lower DPS but for a shorter time, primary hand.

Personally, I'd just put it in Primary and take some smacks at some weak MOBs. That'd be the fastest and least painful way to get some bandages from it.
▲ Page top
Rogues Use, Tanks Confused
QuoteReply
# Jun 30 2004 at 6:25 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592793168815
90 posts
Next time you see a rogue over 50th level ask him to link his weapons please. This weapon is probably THE most commonly seen item rogues all cross EQ have. It procs the one skill rogues have mastered by 40th and Warriors(that think they heal faster standing up haven't). Chances are you run into any warrior and he'll say something negative about this weapon. Then ask him/her what their Bind Wound Skill is and you may get mastered but you'll probably get "duh I haven't really used it much"
▲ Page top
RE: Rogues Use, Tanks Confused
QuoteReply
# Jul 05 2004 at 5:19 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591759579085
View User Forum
Scholar
44 posts
/em resists the urge to flame

If you played a warrior you would know that this is standard issue to warriors and kept handy to almost all but the most raid heavy tank.
it does lose its usefullness after lvl ~60.
difficult and time consuming to bandage up 10K hps.
warriors have NO utility spells or abilities.
so clickies and beneficial procs are always on a warriors want list.
AND
ALL classes regen faster sitting.


Edited, Mon Jul 5 18:22:29 2004

dead man procing
QuoteReply
# May 01 2003 at 1:52 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592760392889
1 post
i read somewhere else once that if you equip this item and start attacking a corpse that it would proc. sure enough last night i bought one and targeted another player's corpse. it doesn't look like you are doing anything but give it some time it should proc and poof free bandages!! i'm off to buy my beastlord one!

Question
QuoteReply
# Jan 16 2003 at 6:24 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1594570705029
86 posts
If I were to give this to a charmed pet, then sent him into battle for a while, then broke charm and killed him, would I find a lot of bandages on his body? I also curious about lupine dagger procs on charmed (or summoned) mobs. Would that allow me to have a Hill Giant disguised as a wolf in Oasis? THAT WOULD BE FUN! Especially when charm wears off and hes rooted by the docks :P <Maniacle Laughter>

-Ollex

QuoteReply
# Jan 05 2004 at 3:04 AM Rating: Default

64 posts
An interesting idea, but I seriously doubt it would work. I could hear this thing proccing while I was fighting Cara, but she had none on her once she was dead.
▲ Page top
Dual Wield Banage Heaven
QuoteReply
# Aug 22 2002 at 6:44 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591775135077
5 posts
This item is ideal for worken up your bind wounds skill. If you got two of them, even better. Sure, the damage isn't great (exspecially for rogue types), but you can't beat free bandages. I usually log on, kill several green mobs, enough to produce a bag or backpack full of bandage stacks. Then I'm off to do my thing. When I log off I make sure to hand out whatever is left over to those in need (being No-Rent and all). Again, I say you can't beat the convenience of this or two of these knives.

Sydaan
25 Rogue
▲ Page top
(Combat)
QuoteReply
# Jul 30 2002 at 11:11 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592252490012
485 posts
The fact that this procs in combat makes this knife much less useful. I do a LOT of bandaging, so I bought one of these, not fulling knowing how the effect worked (thought it was right-click)

Anyway, despite my angst, while sitting in KC, I pulled the knife out and started poking train mobs, and other people's pulls. It procs well enough, and the 20 bandages per proc is nice to have.

Altogether, a nice item, but severely hampered by it's Combat Proccing only. Not like it's already hard enough for us pure melee to get HP back, they seem to always want to make it harder. Oh well, Bind Wound (151) so I do ok either way...
▲ Page top
RE: (Combat)
QuoteReply
# Nov 06 2002 at 2:17 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591776013048
View User Forum
263 posts
This doesn't make it harder. Having bandages summoned through random proc makes it easier than having no bandages at all. The proc isn't extremely useful, I'll grant, but it still of some use.

Hyperbole will be the death of us all.
▲ Page top
health
QuoteReply
# Jul 21 2002 at 5:43 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592254925899
60 posts
This was a very nice present for me, a darkelf. I can't heal myself and it isn't easy to buy bandages since there aren't a lot of merchants willing to watch my inky face. I wouldn't have the money to buy as much as I need to level in this skill anyway. Now, it's all for free, and yes, we darkelves like 'for free'. An amazing weapon. Hehe, who would guess anyone would give a darkelf a gift!!!!

Manuela X'Tasy
Shadowknight of Evil Legions
Innoruuk's pride

Proc Level
QuoteReply
# Mar 04 2002 at 7:27 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591770885985
5 posts
Any idea when the effect will proc? Will it proc for low level charries?
▲ Page top
RE: Proc Level
QuoteReply
# Apr 22 2002 at 2:15 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361835338
49 posts
This dagger procs from level 1 onward. It summons a number of bandages equal to half your level rounded up. My lvl 36 warrior is getting 18 bandages everytime it procs now. I assume it caps at 20 per proc but I will have to level up a bit to find out hehe.
▲ Page top
RE: Proc Level
QuoteReply
# Apr 19 2002 at 7:24 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591760347363
46 posts
Proc'ed for my rogue at level 12.
▲ Page top
Very useful
QuoteReply
# Feb 14 2002 at 3:49 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592250331005
20 posts
I have a lvl 40 warrior and first thing i do when logging on is equip my dagger and chase some greens for a few mins. I have a low dex (87) but it still procs on average once a mob (unless i pick really greens) and as people have said summons half your level rounding down max one stack of 20.

The bandages appear on your cursor and if you dont dump them in you inventory any further procs are lost as far as i can tell.

This bandages saves me a few pp a day which isnt much in the scheme of things but it does add up.

My advice is if you are a tank and you find you do use bandages (not all of us get groups with healers or even groups all the time) get one of these wether by buying it (last price i saw was about 200pp on vazaelle) or getting a group of friends to get it for you.

▲ Page top
RE: Very useful
QuoteReply
# Apr 11 2002 at 6:45 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592250331005
20 posts
Mikespitone,

it has to be swung at the mobs for it to proc not sure if procs work on swings or hits, but either way 5 mins of slapping greens with this in offhand will get you some bandages.

Or if in a good group use it to improve your piercing skill.
▲ Page top
RE: Very useful
QuoteReply
# Apr 12 2002 at 1:35 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593361686641
View User Forum
90 posts
All procs have a chance to go off on any swing, which is rather useful. If you're a caster with a proc'ing weapon you can stan well back and turn auto attack on, and even though you're out of melee range the proc will still hit (as long as you're within the proc effect range, consult the spell parser). The same is true of this knife.
▲ Page top
RE: Very useful
QuoteReply

i have a warrior friend who showed me this item and it really is great, my question is if im fighting a mob and just leave it in my range slot will it proc? or do i have to actually cause damage to the mob with my awful piercing skill.

▲ Page top
Dagger
QuoteReply
# Oct 14 2001 at 12:43 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361516820
View User Forum
133 posts
some info, I read through about half the posts so not sure if this has been said....

Proc: It procs at lvl 1 and is not right clickable, it summons half your level in bandages. So if you are lvl 10 is summons 5 bandages, lvl34 summons 17 bandages .etc .etc

This is Cara's common drop and the 5 times I've killed her she has dropped this every time and the tome twice.
▲ Page top
RE: Dagger
QuoteReply
# Jan 29 2002 at 5:37 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592245640143
30 posts
This is only true to a point. Post level40, you will only summon a stack of bandages, no more than a stack. But yes, Like the magician spell, you'll summon half your lvl up to 40.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 04 2001 at 11:12 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) will pay 500 or so pp for this on the tunare server give me a tell.
Reasons for owning this Knife
QuoteReply
# Jul 31 2001 at 9:23 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592757899618
16 posts
well the first and most apparent is well ITS FREE
and 2 is u don't have to travel to the nearest town saveing your grp from missing its tank (ps if u need bandaids in a grp get a clr fast)
finnaly Num 3 think about the Evil Races, trolls, Ogres, Some DE's, i mean lets see for example, my troll warrior from 19 to current 21 is solo'ing the bard at the Wiz spires in NK, at lvl 19 when she spawned Red i was normally at 1 1/2 bubs to 2 bubs hp and the bandaids woulda helped (woulda pulled a low blue Borer beetle to get procs at lvl 19 bard would be to risky) i normally hada wait a x tra 2-3 min after she spawned to get full hp and i'm a TROLL (u know regen) think of Ogres and DE's w/o regen whats that prolly about a x tra 3-4 min after she spawned, i'm not flameing but when ppl Dis a great item like this its very annoying, i mean where are the Evil races gunna get Bandaids if they are KoS to anyone near them.

Klaven
Enchanter on Fennin Ro

(warrior i spoke of is one of my alts)

# Sep 29 2001 at 4:09 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592757364712

Well since it is NOT clickable you DO have to wield it to get it to PROC! The information here is incorrect and the effect is not triggered in the clicking sense. Calling people a "dumbass" under the guise of "Annonymous"... very brave of you.

#REDACTED, Posted: May 21 2001 at 2:31 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I went to vel 2nd time check gnomes saw one 1.5pp WOOOT i got it. Saves me some pp in bandages. Use it in the first couple of fights then change back :)
#Anonymous, Posted: May 03 2001 at 12:55 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Hey all, this knife sounds sweet, my character is a rogue, and well, I am sick of sitting around waiting for HP to go up, so if anyone would sell it cheap, 50pp or below to a lvl 12 Rogue I would be so appreciative, by the way I am on Sayryn Server, send me an E-mail Dan4440@hotmail.com or send a tell to Denala.
